== Notes for [[Item:Q116668|Q116668]] ==

Ricar d' Astarac

b. circa 975

Father Guillermo I d' Astarac1 b. circa 945

Ricar d' Astarac was born circa 975. She was the daughter of Guillermo I d' Astarac.1 Ricar d' Astarac married García Arnaldo, comte de Bigorre, son of Arnaldo I, comte de Bigorre.1

Family

García Arnaldo, comte de Bigorre b. circa 972

Child

Gersinde, comtesse de Bigorre+ b. c 995, d. a 10381

Citations

[S1265] Genealogy.eu, online genealogy.euweb.cz, Counts of Bigorre, Ribagorza and Pailhars.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
